rows.label: qev042205_MSG0001
rows.name: Wow, amazing, this is amazing, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am truly happy that someone capable
of defeating Nupopon has appeared, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0003
rows.name:
When I first became a spirit, I
was worried that no one would
ever be able to defeat me, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0004
rows.name:
Nopopon has an amazing
eye for people, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0005
rows.name:
He has that kind of personality,
but he is not a bad guy, so
please get along with him, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev042205_SEL0011
rows.name:
Promise that you will
get along with him.

rows.label: qev042205_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev042205_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you could never be
friendly with someone like that.

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0006
rows.name:
What an incredibly mature
person you are, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0007
rows.name:
I am so glad that you are the
one clearing the spirit's
trial... I am truly glad, mo...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0008
rows.name:
If it is you, it seems you will use
the power of the spirits correctly
even if it is given to you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0009
rows.name:
That is the normal way to
think, mo. But still, you
made it all the way here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you did not get along with
Nopopon, you simply could have
avoided taking this trial, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0011
rows.name:
Even if you disliked him, you listened
properly and came all this way, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0012
rows.name: That is no ordinary feat, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then... I shall bestow Nupopon's
blessing upon the Nopon gemstone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0014
rows.name:
Mongara~ Hengara~ Fungara
mongara momomomo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0015
rows.name: There, it is finished, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0016
rows.name:
Do your best without losing your
focus until the very end, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Hm? What is it, mo?
Hurry up and go, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah, that is right. Tell Nopopon to send
more people to take the trial, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042205_MSG0019
rows.name:
I am getting tired of dressing up as
an Arenatect here all the time, mo.[ST:wait ]
